_description: 포스터 이미지 스타일 프리셋 6종 — 업종/분위기별 사진 톤·카피 가이드

warm_cozy.name: 따뜻한 감성
warm_cozy.description: 골든아워 조명, 따뜻한 톤, 아늑한 분위기. 카페·베이커리·브런치에 최적.
warm_cozy.hero_suffix: Style: Warm golden hour photography. Soft amber-toned natural light streaming through a window. Rich warm color temperature (3200K). Shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh. Cozy, inviting atmosphere. Rustic wood and natural textures visible. No harsh shadows. Photorealistic, magazine-quality food/lifestyle photography.
warm_cozy.item_suffix: Style: Warm-toned food photography with golden ambient light. Shallow depth of field, soft bokeh background. Rustic wooden surface or linen napkin as base. Steam or warmth visible where appropriate. Single subject, appetizing presentation. No text, no labels, no overlays.
warm_cozy.color_mood: warm amber, burnt sienna, cream, soft terracotta

copy_tone.headline_style: 감성적 단어 + 가게명 조합. 예: '오늘도, 따뜻하게'

clean_modern.name: 깔끔 모던
clean_modern.description: 미니멀 화이트 배경, 선명한 색감, 정돈된 구도. 클리닉·병원·학원·사무 서비스에 최적.
clean_modern.hero_suffix: Style: Clean modern commercial photography. Pure white or light grey background. Crisp, even studio lighting with soft shadows. High key exposure. Precise, centered composition. Clinical cleanliness and professionalism. Sharp focus throughout. Color-accurate, no color cast. Professional advertising quality.
clean_modern.item_suffix: Style: Clean studio product shot on pure white background. Even, diffused lighting. Sharp focus, no blur. Geometric precision in composition. Professional catalog photography quality. No text, no labels, no overlays.
clean_modern.color_mood: white, light grey, one accent color, clean blue or teal

copy_tone.voice: 신뢰감 있는 전문가 톤, 군더더기 없이 핵심만
copy_tone.headline_style: 핵심 가치 한 줄. 예: '정확한 진단, 확실한 결과'

dramatic_dark.name: 다크 드라마틱
dramatic_dark.description: 어두운 배경, 스팟 조명, 강렬한 명암 대비. 고기집·바·헬스장·프리미엄 서비스에 최적.
dramatic_dark.hero_suffix: Style: Dramatic dark-mood photography. Deep black background with single directional spotlight. Extreme chiaroscuro lighting — bright highlights against deep shadows. Moody, cinematic atmosphere. Rich, saturated colors popping against darkness. Low-key studio lighting. Smoke or steam effects where appropriate. Premium, luxurious feel. Magazine editorial quality.
dramatic_dark.item_suffix: Style: Dark moody product photography on black slate or dark marble surface. Single spotlight from above creating dramatic shadows. Rich color saturation against dark background. Cinematic food/product styling. No text, no labels, no overlays.
dramatic_dark.color_mood: charcoal, deep black, gold accent, rich burgundy

copy_tone.voice: 자신감 넘치는 프리미엄 톤, 짧고 강렬하게
copy_tone.headline_style: 짧고 임팩트 있는 선언문. 예: '고기는, 불이다'

vibrant_pop.name: 비비드 팝
vibrant_pop.description: 높은 채도, 컬러풀, 에너지 넘치는. 분식·배달·프랜차이즈·이벤트에 최적.
vibrant_pop.hero_suffix: Style: Vibrant pop-art inspired food photography. Highly saturated, punchy colors. Bright, even lighting with minimal shadows. Bold complementary color background (red, yellow, or orange). Dynamic angle — slightly tilted or bird's-eye view. Energetic, fun composition with props. Fast-food advertising quality. Eye-catching and appetizing.
vibrant_pop.item_suffix: Style: Bright, colorful product photography with vivid saturated background. Pop art inspired. Overhead or 45-degree angle. Bold, punchy colors. Fun, energetic composition. No text, no labels, no overlays.
vibrant_pop.color_mood: bold red, sunny yellow, electric orange, hot pink

copy_tone.voice: 활기차고 친근한 동네 친구 톤, 말풍선처럼 튀는 문체

vintage_film.name: 빈티지 필름
vintage_film.description: 필름 카메라 감성, 약간 바랜 색감, 그레인. 미용실·네일·플라워·독립 카페에 최적.
vintage_film.hero_suffix: Style: Vintage film photography aesthetic. Kodak Portra 400 color palette — slightly desaturated, warm skin tones, muted greens. Visible film grain texture. Soft, diffused natural daylight. Slightly overexposed highlights. Nostalgic, analog camera feel. Gentle lens flare optional. Medium format film portrait quality.
vintage_film.item_suffix: Style: Vintage analog film product photography. Soft pastel color palette with slight color fade. Gentle film grain. Natural window light with soft shadows. Linen or aged wood surface. Nostalgic, handcrafted feel. No text, no labels, no overlays.
vintage_film.color_mood: muted sage, dusty rose, faded terracotta, antique cream

copy_tone.headline_style: 시적 한 줄. 예: '당신의 하루에, 꽃 한 송이'

minimal_zen.name: 미니멀 젠
minimal_zen.description: 극도의 여백, 정적인 구도, 자연 소재. 요가·명상·한방·프리미엄 한식에 최적.
minimal_zen.hero_suffix: Style: Minimal zen photography with extreme negative space. Muted, desaturated earth tones. Single subject placed using rule-of-thirds with vast empty space. Soft, directional natural light from one side. Japanese wabi-sabi aesthetic. Stone, wood, ceramic textures. Ultra-clean, contemplative composition. Fine art still life quality.
minimal_zen.item_suffix: Style: Minimalist zen food/product photography. Single item on stone or ceramic surface. Extreme negative space (60%+ empty). Muted natural colors. Soft side lighting. Meditative, calm composition. No text, no labels, no overlays.
minimal_zen.color_mood: stone grey, warm beige, moss green, charcoal

copy_tone.voice: 절제된 선(禪) 톤, 한 문장의 여백이 말하는
copy_tone.headline_style: 단어 하나 + 여백. 예: '한 그릇의 정성'

auto_select_rules._description: brief.industry가 매칭되면 해당 프리셋 사용, 없으면 톤에서 추론, 최종 fallback은 warm_cozy
